extraction.one_line_summary: MILANO Juan Sebastian won flat Stage 12 via OLIVEIRA Rui's spectacular 500m lead-out that caught organized sprint trains off-guard.
tactical_patterns: OLIVEIRA Rui's ultra-long 500m lead-out with late acceleration overcame organized trains by exploiting momentum differential over positioning.
UAE team showed patience waiting until 200m while GROVES Kaden launched from distance, proving speed reserves trump early positioning.
JANSENS Jimmy neutralized breaks for third consecutive sprint stage, revealing Alpecin's systematic control pattern on flat Vuelta stages.

rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastián: positive: Won from distance with 200m sprint after waiting maximally long, showing tactical patience rare for sprinters.
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Rui: positive: Delivered best-of-race 500m lead-out winning stage, suggesting unexploited sprint train leadership capability for UAE.
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: neutral: Fastest raw speed but finished second launching early, revealing positioning vulnerability despite green jersey dominance.
rider_signals.JANSSENS Jimmy: positive: Third successful break neutralization, establishing himself as critical Alpecin flat-stage control rider.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: Survived pancake-flat stage in red but visibly nervous before 14,000ft mountain day, suggesting GC pressure mounting.
